subject: Update certs and will be valid until Jan 2022

entries.message: Patch Set 1: Cherry Picked from branch guilin.

Patch Set 1:

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 1 on the queue.

Patch Set 1:

Gitlab Azure 3: Chained-CI build started (pipeline id: 268144594), max time: 14400 seconds

Patch Set 1:

Could you please review this change for frankfurt branch? Thanks in advance!

Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1

The aai certificate expires on 17.03.2021 in Frankfurt, since this release should be maintenance till June will be good to update this aai cert also in this branch. What do you think?

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-2

We do not support Frankfurt since it is more the 2 releases back, we only support current release - 1 being the Guilin release. If this changes are needed they can be taken in by the implementing team but will not be merged in ONAP.

Patch Set 1:

Please either get to the conclusion or abandon this change

Will not merge into gerrit since release is no longer supported and no jenkins jobs present
